title: Automatic replacement
description: Automatically equips Totems of Undying to your offhand (toggleable in ESC menu). Totem stack size increased to 8. Many other item stack limits adjusted. World height extended from -128 to 1024.
body:
# Automatic Replacement

## ✨ Features

### Auto Totem Equip
- Automatically moves Totem of Undying to offhand when empty
- Toggle via ESC → Options menu button
- Global setting, syncs to all players

### Commands

| Command | Effect |
|---------|--------|
| `/auto true` | Enable |
| `/auto false` | Disable |
| `/auto toggle` | Toggle |
| `/auto status` | Check status |

### Stack Size Changes

| Item | Limit |
|------|-------|
| Totem of Undying | 8 |
| Milk Bucket | 16 |
| Cake | 8 |
| Shield | 4 |
| All Boats / Chest Boats | 8 |
| All Minecarts | 8 |
| All Mob Heads | 8 |
| All Potions | 16 |
| Name Tag | 16 |
| Armor Stand | 4 |
| All Beds | 16 |
| Saddle | 16 |
| All Buckets | 16 |
| Bundle (empty) | 16 |
| Elytra | 8 |
| Book and Quill (empty) | 8 |
| All Music Discs | 16 |

### World Height
- Min Y: **-128**
- Max Y: **1024**

## 🔧 Technical Details
- Fabric API networking
- Mixin for stack size
- Mixin for Options button

## 📦 Requirements
- Minecraft 1.20.1+
- Fabric Loader ≥0.19.2
- Fabric API (latest)

## 📄 License
MIT
